# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-09 by /mol:map (whole-repo scope, post-rectification refresh)._

## Inventory (layered)

Three-layer dependency direction: **workspace ← workflow ← agent**, with the
application shell (server / cli / plugins) on top and the UI downstream of
the server's OpenAPI surface.

### Module list

**Layer 1 — `src/molexp/workspace/` (bottom — pure storage)**
- `molexp.workspace` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public storage surface.
- `molexp.workspace.assets` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_adapter.py`, `accessors.py`, `artifact.py`, `base.py`, `catalog.py`, `checkpoint.py`, `data.py`, `error.py`, `execution.py`, `lineage.py`, `log.py`, `manifest.py`, `output.py`, `view.py`).
- `molexp.workspace.base` — atomic-JSON I/O + container-index helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.checkpoint` — `CheckpointState` model + file IO.
- `molexp.workspace.context` — `Context` data model.
- `molexp.workspace.errors` — workspace exception hierarchy.
- `molexp.workspace.experiment` — `Experiment` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.metrics` — run-local JSONL metrics (in-tree, not a plugin).
- `molexp.workspace.models` — `WorkspaceMetadata` / `ProjectMetadata` / `ExperimentMetadata` / `RunMetadata` / `ExecutionRecord` / `ComputeTarget` / `ErrorInfo`.
- `molexp.workspace.param` — `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace` / `Params`.
- `molexp.workspace.project` — `Project` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.resume_policy` — `WalltimeChunk` + resume policies.
- `molexp.workspace.run` — `Run` + `RunContext` + `RunStatus`.
- `molexp.workspace.schema_version` — JSON-schema version constant + load/upgrade helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.subsystem` — generic `SubsystemStore` (vends `.subsystems/<kind>/`).
- `molexp.workspace.targets` — compute-target helpers (`add_target` / `target_run_dir` / `to_transport`).
- `molexp.workspace.utils` — `slugify` and small helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.workspace` — `Workspace` entity + `set_cli_root_override`.

**Layer 2 — `src/molexp/workflow/` (middle — graph engine)**
- `molexp.workflow` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public OOP API.
- `molexp.workflow.cache` — `Caching` LRU + `CacheEntry` + `CACHE_FORMAT_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workflow.cache_store` — `CacheStore` Protocol + `FileCacheStore` + `WorkspaceCacheStore` + `WORKFLOW_CACHE_SUBSYSTEM_KIND`.
- `molexp.workflow.compiler` — `WorkflowCompiler` + `default_compiler` (IR ↔ Python ↔ Mermaid ↔ Spec).
- `molexp.workflow.context` — `TaskContext` + `ActorContext` (read-only typed contexts).
- `molexp.workflow.promote` — `promote_callable` / `resolve_callable_entrypoint` / `resolve_spec_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.workflow.protocols` — `Runnable` / `Streamable` `@runtime_checkable` `Protocol`s.
- `molexp.workflow.registry` — `TaskTypeRegistry` + `default_registry` (slug → factory).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot` — `TaskSnapshot` (AST-normalized identity).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot_ref` — `WorkflowSnapshotRef` (on-disk reference shape).
- `molexp.workflow.spec` — `Workflow` (compiled, frozen) + `WorkflowBuilder` (decorator + OOP).
- `molexp.workflow.task` — `Task` / `Actor` plain `abc.ABC` base classes (NOT pg `BaseNode`).
- `molexp.workflow.types` — `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` re-export, edge sum types, error hierarchy, `Next` (IR-internal, not in `__all__`).
- `molexp.workflow.version` — `WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private subpackage) — sole `import pydantic_graph` site; modules: `compiler.py` (`WorkflowGraphCompiler`), `node.py` (`WorkflowStep`), `persistence.py` (`RunStorePersistence`), `runtime.py` (`GraphWorkflowRuntime` + `make_execution_id`), `state.py` (`WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`, `CompiledWorkflow`).
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — JSON-Schema Draft-07 wire-format docs (`workflow.json`, `task_config.json`, `link.json` + `README.md`).

**Layer 3 — `src/molexp/agent/` (top — LLM harness)**
- `molexp.agent` (`__init__.py`) — package root, exports the four-name public surface (`AgentRunner` / `AgentMode` / `AgentRunResult` / `AgentSession`) **only**.
- `molexp.agent.mode` — `AgentMode` ABC + `AgentRunResult` (frozen pydantic).
- `molexp.agent.runner` — `AgentRunner` (lazy harness construction).
- `molexp.agent.session` — `AgentSession` (plain class; carries `history` / `mode_state`).
- `molexp.agent.settings` — `AgentSettings` (workspace-scoped tunables).
- `molexp.agent.types` — `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `Message`, `Usage`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.modes` — public mode subpackage; `chat.py` (`ChatMode` / `ChatModeConfig`), `review.py` (`ReviewMode` / `ReviewModeConfig` — phase-2 placeholder).
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan` — workflow-backed plan mode subpackage; `_mode.py` (`PlanMode` / `PlanModeConfig` / `PlanResult` / `PLAN_WORKFLOW`), `protocols.py` (PlanDeps service Protocols + defaults), `schemas.py` (Plan IR pydantic models), `tasks.py` (per-stage `Task` subclasses driving the plan workflow).
- `molexp.agent.sessions` — `SessionMetadata`, `SessionStore`, `SessionCatalog` (absorbed `workspace.sessions.SessionLibrary`); subsystem kind = `agent.sessions`.
- `molexp.agent.context` — `ContextManager` / `DefaultContextManager`, `ContextPacket`, `ContextBuildRequest`, `ContextBudget`, `ContextRef`, `PromptComposer`, `PromptLayer`, `ContextCompressor` / `NoopCompressor` / `TailCompressor`.
- `molexp.agent.memory` — `MemoryStore` Protocol + `JsonlMemoryStore` / `NoopMemoryStore` + `MemoryRecord`.
- `molexp.agent.recovery` — `AgentError` family (typed failure exceptions), `ConstraintSet`, `RecoveryPolicy` Protocol + `NoRetryPolicy` / `SimpleRetryPolicy`.
- `molexp.agent.persistence` — generic three-tier resource store (registrations + user + workspace); `tiered.py` (`TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`), `router.py` (`tiered_router_factory`). Re-purposed shared infra; consumed by `skills`, `mcp`, `tools`.
- `molexp.agent.skills` — `Skill` + `SkillStore` (three-tier) + slash-command parser (`ParsedCommand` / `parse` / `CommandKind`); `native/` registers built-in skills (`plan`).
- `molexp.agent.tools` — `ToolSpec`, `ToolResult`, `ToolContext`, `ToolCallable`, `RegisteredTool`, `ToolRegistry`, `ToolDispatcher`, `ApprovalGate` / `AutoApproveGate` / `DenyAllGate`, `ToolPolicy` + `ApprovalDecision` + `PERMISSIVE_POLICY` / `READ_ONLY_POLICY`, `ToolSource` (registry), `native_tool` decorator + `native/` (`workspace`, `workflow`, `chat`, `web`).
- `molexp.agent.mcp` — `McpStore`, `McpServerEntry`, `McpScope`, `McpSecretsStore`, `UnresolvedSecretError`, `McpToolSource` (auto-registers on import), `probe_server` / `list_mcp_tools`, OAuth session registry; tool-store `tool_store.py`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private subpackage) — sole `import pydantic_ai` site; `harness.py` (`PydanticAIHarness` + `HarnessResult`), `mcp.py` (`build_mcp_server`), `provider.py` (`PydanticAIProvider` for plan mode tier dispatch).

**Layer 4 — `src/molexp/server/` (FastAPI app — top of application shell)**
- `molexp.server` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app` — `create_app()` factory, lifespan, bundled-UI discovery, CORS for dev.
- `molexp.server.dependencies` — `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings` (FastAPI DI).
- `molexp.server.exceptions` — typed HTTP exception classes.
- `molexp.server.handlers` — exception → JSON envelope handlers.
- `molexp.server.manager` — `ServerManager` lifecycle (start/stop/status/logs).
- `molexp.server.routes` (subpackage with `create_api_router()`) — `agent.py`, `agent_admin.py`, `agent_tasks.py`, `agent_task_store.py`, `asset.py`, `catalog.py`, `execution.py`, `experiment.py`, `molq.py`, `project.py`, `registry.py`, `reviews.py`, `review_store.py`, `run.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace.py`, `_scope.py`.
- `molexp.server.schemas` (subpackage) — `requests.py`, `responses.py`, `molq.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace_runs.py`.

**Layer 5 — `src/molexp/cli/` (Typer CLI — application shell)**
- `molexp.cli` (`__init__.py`) — Typer `app` instance + side-effect command registration + third-party plugin registration.
- `molexp.cli.__main__` — entrypoint shim.
- `molexp.cli._common` — shared rich console + `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` + `deterministic_run_id` + `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.asset` — `molexp asset …` commands.
- `molexp.cli.experiment` — `molexp experiment …` commands.
- `molexp.cli.explore_cmd` — `molexp explore` (read-only browse).
- `molexp.cli.project` — `molexp project …` commands.
- `molexp.cli.prune` — `molexp prune` (cleanup).
- `molexp.cli.run_cmd` — `molexp run` (script-driven workflow execution).
- `molexp.cli.runs` — `molexp runs …` (run management).
- `molexp.cli.serve_cmd` — `molexp serve` (FastAPI + bundled UI).
- `molexp.cli.target_cmd` — `molexp target …` (compute-target registry).
- `molexp.cli.watch_cmd` — `molexp watch` (live monitoring).
- `molexp.cli.workspace_cmd` — `molexp init` / `molexp workspace …`.

**Layer 6 — `src/molexp/sweep/` (parameter sweep helpers)**
- _Empty directory — no Python modules present (reserved)._

**Layer 7 — `src/molexp/plugins/` (registered plugin packages)**
- `molexp.plugins` (`__init__.py`) — `Capability` enum (currently `GH` only), `PluginRegistry`, `CapabilityNotAvailable`, lazy GH loader, re-exports `CliPlugin` / `discover_cli_plugins` / `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli` — `CliPlugin` descriptor + `discover_cli_plugins()` + `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui` — `discover_ui_plugin_dirs()` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh` (subpackage) — `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, GraphQL/REST models (`Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`); modules `client.py`, `models.py`, `queries.py`.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq` (subpackage) — `submit.py`, `metadata.py`, `spec.py`, `dashboard.py`, `staging.py` (molq scheduler submission).

**Layer 8 — `ui/src/` (React 19 frontend — package-level summary)**
- `ui/src/App.tsx` + `index.tsx` + `env.d.ts` — entry shell.
- `ui/src/api/` — `generated/` (auto-generated OpenAPI client, **never hand-edit**: `core/`, `models/`, `services/`).
- `ui/src/app/` — application root; `registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer map), `types.ts`, `panels/`, `layout/`, `oauth/`, `components/`, `runs/`, `settings/`, `state/` (`api.ts`, `useWorkspaceState.ts`, `useNavigationState.ts`, `useDiscoveredFileTypes.ts`, `mcpEvents.ts`).
- `ui/src/app/renderers/` — entity viewers + `registerRenderers.ts`; sub-areas `agent_session/`, `agent_settings/`.
- `ui/src/components/` — shared presentational components (`previews/`, `ui/`).
- `ui/src/lib/` + `ui/src/lib/plugins/` — utilities + UI-plugin loader.
- `ui/src/plugins/` — bundled UI plugin sources (`core/`, `metrics/`, `molq/`, `molvis/`).
- `ui/src/resolvers/` — `BaseResolver`, `WorkflowResolver`, `ContextResolver`, `DocumentResolver` (entity-resolution dispatch).
- `ui/src/__fixtures__/` — test fixtures.
- `ui/src/styles/`, `ui/src/types/` — shared CSS + ambient TS types.
- `ui/mocks/` — MSW handlers (`browser.ts`, `node.ts`, `db/`, `handlers/`, `utils/`) for `dev:mock` mode.

### Public surface

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- `molexp.workspace`: `Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `RunStatus`, `Context`, `Params`, `ParamSpace`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, `WorkspaceMetadata`, `ProjectMetadata`, `ExperimentMetadata`, `RunMetadata`, `ExecutionRecord`, `ComputeTarget`, `ErrorInfo`, `SubsystemStore`, `AssetCatalog`, `AssetsView`, `AssetScope`, `AssetManifest`, `Asset`, `ArtifactAsset`, `DataAsset`, `DataAssetLibrary`, `CheckpointAsset`, `LogAsset`, `OutputAsset`, `ErrorTraceAsset`, `ExecutionStateAsset`, `Producer`, `add_target` / `get_target` / `has_target` / `list_targets` / `remove_target` / `target_run_dir` / `to_transport`, `atomic_write_json`, error hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError`).
- `molexp.workspace.assets`: adds `ASSET_ADAPTER`, `AnyAsset`, `parse_asset`, `ArtifactAccessor`, `CheckpointAccessor`, `LogAccessor`, `ImportAction`, `lineage` submodule.
- Top-level `molexp.__init__`: re-exports `Workspace` / `Project` / `Experiment` / `Run` / `RunContext` / `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace` + `Logger` / `get_logger` / `entry`; lazy `__getattr__` for `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- `molexp.workflow`: `Workflow`, `WorkflowBuilder`, `WorkflowCompiler`, `default_compiler`, `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` (re-export of `pydantic_graph.End`), `Task`, `Actor`, `TaskContext`, `ActorContext`, `Runnable`, `Streamable`, `TaskTypeRegistry`, `default_registry`, `Caching`, `CacheStore`, `FileCacheStore`, `WorkspaceCacheStore`, `WORKFLOW_CACHE_SUBSYSTEM_KIND`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `make_execution_id`, `promote_callable`, `resolve_callable_entrypoint`, `resolve_spec_entrypoint`, edge sum types (`UnconditionalEdges`, `BranchEdges`, `OutEdges`), versioning (`WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`), error hierarchy (`WorkflowError`, `CycleError`, `EdgeShapeError`, `EntryAmbiguousError`, `UnknownTaskError`, `UnreachableTaskError`, `UnknownRouteError`, `MissingRouteError`, `WorkflowDeadlockError`, `ParallelExecutionError`, `LoopMaxItersExceeded`).
- `Next` is intentionally **not** in `__all__` (IR-internal routing token — reach via `from molexp.workflow.types import Next`).
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private): `End`, `WorkflowGraphCompiler`, `RunStorePersistence`, `GraphWorkflowRuntime` (consumed only by `workflow.spec` and `workflow.__init__`).

**Layer 3 — agent**
- `molexp.agent`: **exactly four names** — `AgentRunner`, `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentSession`. No factories, no `Agent(provider=...)`.
- `molexp.agent.modes`: `ChatMode`, `ChatModeConfig`, `PlanMode`, `PlanModeConfig`, `PlanResult`, `PLAN_WORKFLOW`, `ReviewMode`, `ReviewModeConfig`.
- `molexp.agent.types`: `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `Message`, `Usage`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.settings`: `AgentSettings`.
- `molexp.agent.sessions`: `SessionMetadata`, `SessionStore`, `SessionCatalog`, `SESSIONS_SUBSYSTEM_KIND` (`"agent.sessions"`), `SESSION_METADATA_FILENAME`.
- `molexp.agent.context`: `ContextManager`, `DefaultContextManager`, `ContextPacket`, `ContextBuildRequest`, `ContextBudget`, `ContextRef`, `PromptComposer`, `PromptLayer`, `ContextCompressor`, `NoopCompressor`, `TailCompressor`.
- `molexp.agent.memory`: `MemoryStore`, `MemoryRecord`, `JsonlMemoryStore`, `NoopMemoryStore`.
- `molexp.agent.recovery`: `AgentError`, `ApprovalDenied`, `ContextOverflow`, `InvalidPlan`, `ModelFailure`, `PolicyDenied`, `ToolFailure`, `ToolNotFound`, `UserCancelled`, `WorkspaceConflict`, `ConstraintSet`, `RecoveryPolicy`, `RetryDecision`, `NoRetryPolicy`, `SimpleRetryPolicy`.
- `molexp.agent.persistence`: `TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`.
- `molexp.agent.skills`: `Skill`, `SkillStore`, `ParsedCommand`, `parse`, `CommandKind`, `RESERVED_SLASH_NAMES`, `SLASH_NAME_RE`, `SKILLS_FILE`, `USER_HOME_DIR_NAME`, `USER_HOME_SKILLS_FILE`.
- `molexp.agent.tools`: `ToolSpec`, `ToolResult`, `ToolContext`, `ToolCallable`, `RegisteredTool`, `ToolRegistry`, `ToolDispatcher`, `ToolEventCallback`, `ApprovalGate`, `AutoApproveGate`, `DenyAllGate`, `ToolPolicy`, `ApprovalDecision`, `PERMISSIVE_POLICY`, `READ_ONLY_POLICY`, `DuplicateToolError`, `native_tool`, `is_native_tool`, `get_native_spec`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp`: `McpStore`, `McpServerEntry`, `McpScope`, `McpSecretsStore`, `McpToolSource`, `McpToolSummary`, `McpServerToolList`, `ProbeOutcome`, `UnresolvedSecretError`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `FileTokenStorage`, `build_oauth_provider`, `default_redirect_uri`, `session_registry`, `storage_for`, `list_mcp_tools`, `probe_server`, `MCP_CONFIG_FILENAME`, `MCP_SECRETS_FILENAME`, `PROBE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`, `START_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`, `SOURCE_NAME`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private): `__all__: list[str] = []` — nothing publicly exported. `PydanticAIHarness`, `HarnessResult`, `build_mcp_server`, `PydanticAIProvider` are reachable only via dotted internal paths.

**Layer 4 — server**
- `molexp.server`: `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app`: `create_app()` (FastAPI factory), `lifespan`.
- `molexp.server.dependencies`: `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`.
- `molexp.server.routes`: `create_api_router` + per-domain routers (`agent`, `agent_admin`, `agent_tasks`, `asset`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiment`, `molq`, `project`, `registry`, `reviews`, `run`, `targets`, `workspace`).
- `molexp.server.schemas`: a wide pydantic surface for OpenAPI codegen — request models (`ProjectCreateRequest` / `ExperimentCreateRequest` / `RunCreateRequest` / `RunStatusUpdateRequest` / `WorkspaceOpenRequest` / `ExecutionCreateRequest` / `ApprovalRespondRequest` / `PlanDecisionRequest` / `ReviewDecisionRequest` / `SkillCreateRequest` / `SkillLaunchRequest` / `SkillUpdateRequest` / `CustomToolCreateRequest` / `CustomToolUpdateRequest` / `CustomToolHttpInvokerRequest` / `McpServerUpsertRequest` / `McpHttpSpecRequest` / `McpStdioSpecRequest` / `McpSecretSetRequest` / `McpOAuth2AuthRequest` / `McpOAuthCallbackRequest` / `AssetUpdateRequest` / `AgentProviderUpdateRequest` / `GoalCreateRequest` / `UserMessageCreateRequest` / `CommandParseRequest`) and a wide response surface (project / experiment / run / workspace / execution / asset / catalog / metrics / lammps / workflow snapshot / task type / agent session / tool / health / cache / command / skill / custom tool / mcp / review / ui-plugin / folder + file responses). See `src/molexp/server/schemas/` for the full enumeration; this surface drives `ui/src/api/generated/`.

**Layer 5 — cli**
- `molexp.cli`: `app` (Typer instance). Commands attached as side effects: `molexp run`, `molexp serve`, `molexp init`, `molexp project …`, `molexp experiment …`, `molexp runs …`, `molexp asset …`, `molexp target …`, `molexp watch`, `molexp explore`, `molexp prune`, `molexp workspace …`. Third-party plugins discovered via `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli._common`: `console`, `rprint`, `_TERMINAL_STATUSES`, `deterministic_run_id`, `reap_zombie_run`.

**Layer 6 — sweep**: _no symbols (empty package)._

**Layer 7 — plugins**
- `molexp.plugins`: `Capability` (currently `GH` only — `AGENT`/`CODING`/etc. removed), `CapabilityNotAvailable`, `PluginRegistry`, `registry`, `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli`: `CliPlugin` (immutable `__slots__` class), `discover_cli_plugins`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui`: `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh`: `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, `Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq`: scheduler submission helpers (modules only, no `__init__.py` re-exports beyond docstring).

**Layer 8 — ui**
- TypeScript ESM exports — surface is largely the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`api/generated/`). Hand-written modules export per-file React components (`*Viewer.tsx`, `*Inspector.tsx`), Zustand store hooks (`useWorkspaceState`, `useNavigationState`), `registerRenderers()`, `resolvers/index.ts`, MSW handler arrays, and the UI-plugin loader (`lib/plugins/`). Public registration points: `app/registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer), `app/renderers/registerRenderers.ts`, `mocks/handlers/` per-domain handler arrays.

### Style summary

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- naming: `PascalCase` types, `snake_case` functions; `*Metadata` pydantic models for on-disk shapes; `*Asset` for typed asset variants; `*ExistsError` / `*NotFoundError` for typed exceptions.
- construction: pure-data types are `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)`; runtime entities (`Workspace` / `Project` / `Experiment` / `Run`) are plain Python classes; child factories (`workspace.project(...)`, `project.experiment(...)`, `experiment.run(...)`) are idempotent and lazy — no I/O in `__init__` except `Workspace`, which materializes its own root.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `errors.py` carry the entity id; atomic JSON via temp-file + `os.replace` in `base.py:atomic_write_json`; `_KIND_PATTERN` validates `SubsystemStore` kind shape.
- I/O discipline: every JSON write goes through `atomic_write_json`; every container has a rebuilt-on-write index file; `schema_version` integer wraps every entity-level JSON.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- naming: builder/spec separation (`WorkflowBuilder` → `Workflow` after `.build()`); `*_to_*` method names on `WorkflowCompiler`; error class names `<Verb>Error`; edge sum types `<Noun>Edges`.
- construction: value types are `BaseModel(frozen=True)` (e.g. `WorkflowResult`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `WorkflowVersion`); runtime container `WorkflowExecution` is a plain class because it holds live asyncio state; `Task` / `Actor` are plain `abc.ABC` subclasses (NOT pg `BaseNode`); `_pydantic_graph/` is the only subtree allowed to use `@dataclass` (forced by pg's contract).
- error handling: `WorkflowError` hierarchy raised at compile time; `ParallelExecutionError` aggregates per-element failures with index-keyed dict; `LoopMaxItersExceeded` is a non-fatal `Warning`; cache `read` corruption is logged + entry deleted (never re-raised); compile-time validation in `WorkflowGraphCompiler.compile` fails fast.
- single-track scheduler: one `WorkflowStep` `BaseNode` drives the whole scheduler; `_invoke_one` cascades `Task → Actor → Runnable → Streamable → callable`; `Next(label)` deliberately not in `__all__`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- naming: four-name public surface (`AgentRunner` / `AgentMode` / `AgentRunResult` / `AgentSession`); concrete modes are `<Verb>Mode` + matching `<Verb>ModeConfig`; private subpackages prefixed `_pydanticai/`.
- construction: pure data is `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)` (per CLAUDE.md `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` is **forbidden** here); runtime containers are plain Python (`AgentSession`, `AgentRunner`); harness construction is **lazy on first `AgentRunner.run()`**.
- error handling: typed `AgentError` subclass tree mirrors `FailureKind` enum; `AgentFailure` flows through tool results and events as a frozen pydantic record; `ReviewMode.run` raises `NotImplementedError` (phase-2 placeholder).
- import discipline: `import molexp.agent` does not eagerly load `pydantic_ai`; `pydantic_graph` is **never** imported under `agent/`; only `agent/_pydanticai/*.py` may `import pydantic_ai`.

**Layer 4 — server**
- naming: route modules named after the domain entity (`run.py`, `experiment.py`, …); request schemas suffixed `*Request`, response schemas suffixed `*Response`; per-domain `APIRouter` aggregated by `create_api_router()`.
- construction: routes registered via `include_router`; FastAPI DI through `Depends(get_workspace)` / `Depends(get_settings)`; lifespan async context manager; CORS in dev, static-file mount in production.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `server/exceptions.py` mapped to JSON envelopes by `handlers.py:register_exception_handlers`; bundled-frontend lookup via `importlib.resources` falls back gracefully when `dist/` empty.

**Layer 5 — cli**
- naming: command modules suffixed `_cmd.py` for `serve`/`run`/`watch`/`target`/`workspace`/`explore`; pluralized for `runs.py`, `asset.py`, `project.py`, `experiment.py`.
- construction: single Typer `app` instance built in `cli/__init__.py`; command modules import `app` for side-effect registration; third-party plugin registration walks `molexp.cli_plugins` entry points after built-ins.
- error handling: per-plugin `try / except Exception` with `logger.warning` so one broken plugin cannot prevent the CLI from booting; `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` constant for non-cancellable run states.

**Layer 6 — sweep**: _empty (no style observed)._

**Layer 7 — plugins**
- naming: subpackage names `<category>_<implementation>` (`submit_molq`); one subpackage per `Capability`; `gh.client.GitHubClient` is async-only.
- construction: capability lazy loader pattern (`_load_gh()` imports `httpx` + the impl); `PluginRegistry` caches success / failure per `Capability`; `CliPlugin` is a frozen `__slots__` class with `register: Callable[[typer.Typer], None]`.
- error handling: every entry-point load wrapped in `_safe_load` / `_safe_resolve`; `api_version` mismatches and duplicate plugin ids are warned + skipped, never raised; `CapabilityNotAvailable` carries an `_INSTALL_HINTS` install hint.

**Layer 8 — ui**
- naming: PascalCase for components (`*Viewer.tsx`, `*Inspector.tsx`); kebab-case for routes; `use*` for hooks; `state/` holds Zustand stores.
- construction: React 19 + Rsbuild; renderers registered via `registerRenderers.ts` keyed by entity-type strings in `app/registry.ts`; OpenAPI client regenerated by `npm run generate:api` (never hand-edit `api/generated/`); MSW handlers under `mocks/handlers/` mirror server route domains.
- error handling: panels render fallbacks for missing data; UI-plugin loader logs and skips broken bundles.

### Layer roles

- `molexp.workspace` — **Layer 1 (workspace)**, bottom of the dependency DAG. Pure storage primitive. Owns assets, hierarchy, atomic JSON, generic `SubsystemStore`. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`, `molexp.sweep`, `pydantic_ai`, or `pydantic_graph`.
- `molexp.workflow` — **Layer 2 (workflow)**. Graph engine. Uses `molexp.workspace` only (for `Run`, `RunContext`, `atomic_write_json`, `SubsystemStore`-backed cache). **MUST NOT import** `molexp.agent` or `pydantic_ai`. May import `pydantic_graph` **only** under `workflow/_pydantic_graph/`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` — **Layer 2 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_graph` site in the repo. `WorkflowStep` is the single `BaseNode` molexp exposes; rest is molexp-owned scheduling.
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — **Layer 2 / wire-format**. JSON-Schema documents consumed by the agent layer's IR emitters and the server's IR round-trip.
- `molexp.agent` — **Layer 3 (agent)**, top of the core dependency DAG. LLM harness. Uses `molexp.workspace` + `molexp.workflow`. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`, `molexp.sweep`. May import `pydantic_ai` **only** under `agent/_pydanticai/`. **Never** imports `pydantic_graph`. `import molexp.agent` must not eagerly load either SDK.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` — **Layer 3 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_ai` site. Lazy harness.
- `molexp.agent.modes` / `agent.modes.plan` / `agent.sessions` / `agent.context` / `agent.memory` / `agent.recovery` / `agent.persistence` / `agent.skills` / `agent.tools` / `agent.mcp` — **Layer 3 / agent subsystems**. Each owns a private subdirectory and (where applicable) its own subsystem kind.
- `molexp.server` — **Layer 4 (application shell — FastAPI app)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. UI is downstream via OpenAPI codegen.
- `molexp.cli` — **Layer 5 (application shell — Typer CLI)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. Discovers third-party CLI plugins via `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.sweep` — **Layer 6 (sweep helpers)**. Currently empty; reserved.
- `molexp.plugins` — **Layer 7 (registered plugin packages)**. Registry of optional capabilities (`GH` only; the legacy `AGENT`/`CODING` registry indirection was removed alongside `AgentService` / `CodingAgentClient`). Discovers third-party CLI / UI plugins via entry-point groups.
- `ui/src` — **Layer 8 (frontend)**. React 19 SPA. Downstream of `molexp.server` via auto-generated OpenAPI client (`ui/src/api/generated/`). Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Deletions verified absent (vs. 2026-05-08 blueprint)

`agent/factory.py`, `agent/service.py`, `agent/orchestration/`, `agent/coding_protocol.py`, `agent/model.py`, `agent/model_registry.py`, `agent/planning/`, `agent/replan.py`, `agent/sandbox.py`, `agent/_legacy_types.py`, and `molexp.workspace.sessions:SessionLibrary` — all confirmed absent. `agent/persistence/` exists but was **re-purposed** post-rectification: it now hosts the generic three-tier resource store (`TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`) consumed by `agent.skills`, `agent.tools`, and `agent.mcp`. Old session-persistence semantics moved up into `agent.sessions.SessionCatalog`.

<!-- mol:map:managed end -->

## Conventions

This section lives **outside** the `mol:map:managed` markers and survives
re-runs of `/mol:map`.

### Reserved subsystem kinds

The workspace charter (CLAUDE.md `## Layer charters`) requires subsystem
kinds to match `lowercase ASCII, dot-separated, no path traversal`. The
following kinds are reserved by the agent layer and must not be re-used
by other consumers:

- `agent.sessions` — `agent.sessions.SessionCatalog` private storage
  (existing).
- `agent.plan-experiments` — **reserved 2026-05-09 by the
  `planmode-workspace-pipeline-*` chain** for PlanMode-materialized
  experiment workspaces; consumed via
  `Workspace.subsystem_store("agent.plan-experiments")` in
  `agent/modes/plan/workspace_layout.py` (sub-spec 03 onward).
- `workflow.cache` — `WorkspaceCacheStore` content-addressed result
  cache (existing).
